description_long: This is a small rustic wooden cabin enclosed by a wooden picket fence, set on a stone-paved ground. The cabin features weathered wooden planks for its walls and roof, with a prominent gable roof and a single white-framed door at the front. A tall, yellowish chimney rises from the rear of the roof, adding a distinctive vertical element. The fence is constructed from alternating light and dark wooden planks, with a double-gate opening at the front. The cabin appears to have a single room, with no visible windows, and is elevated slightly above the ground on short supports. The overall appearance suggests a simple, utilitarian structure suitable for a rural or park-like urban setting.
description: A small rustic wooden cabin with a gable roof, white door, and tall chimney, surrounded by a wooden picket fence on a stone-paved base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white door, gable roof, and the main entrance with the double-gate fence opening.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the cabin, the tall chimney, and the continuous fence with no openings.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the cabin, the chimney's position, and the uninterrupted fence line.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cabin's side wall, roof overhang, and the fence with no visible entrance.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, constructed from weathered wooden planks, featuring a single tall chimney at the rear
attribute_window_arrangement: No visible windows on any side; the cabin appears to be windowless from all provided views
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade, directly aligned with the fence gate
